name: Preston Benson Videography: Durango Video Production

reviews.text: Our Company, United Pipeline Systems, has worked with Preston to film, photograph, and edit high quality project related videos for our use in Business Development, Sales, and Client Education purposes. Preston was quickly able to understand our vision and worked seamlessly with our field crews to capture visually appealing videos and photographs. We grateful for his willingness and ability to travel to various site locations and be flexible on timing to suit our shifting project schedules. Looking forward to working with Preston on future projects!
Preston did a fantastic job on my project walk-through video for a recent interiors project. He was easy to work with and does beautiful work. I am looking forward to working with him again!

I worked with Preston on a corporate video project. He was professional throughout the process and his attention to detail and expertise really shows in the finished project. If you're looking for someone to create high-quality video content, I highly recommend Preston.

Preston is extremely professional, easy to communicate with, on time, and works well with other vendors. He made our entire family and bridal party feel at ease while being on camera, and he had a ton of creative ideas for footage. The final footage that Preston delivered to my husband and I was tear producing and insanely beautiful. I would recommend Preston to anyone needing videography services of any kind!

So appreciative of Preston Benson Videography.  He was the videographer  recently that I (Say I Do Now) officiated in Purgatory.  The video he produced was of very professional quality and captured the day and all the magic it held.  Couldn't ask for more.
